data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: estradiol treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context and one record_evidence verified quote. Do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.
